commands: Revise the section on composite indexes to include a detailed analysis of their potential impact on write operations, considering the trade-off between read and write performance.
Add a discussion on the storage implications of the proposed indexing strategy, particularly focusing on how partial indexes can help mitigate increased storage requirements.
Incorporate specific examples of query patterns that would benefit from the proposed indexing strategy to provide clearer justification for the recommendations.
Include a plan for monitoring the performance of both read and write operations post-implementation to ensure the balance between them is maintained.
Suggest a regular maintenance schedule for the indexes to prevent performance degradation over time, including reindexing and monitoring for index bloat.
